meaning: n.克拉马斯人[语],克拉马斯河(美国俄勒冈州南部)
examples: I had classmates from Hawaii and Klamath Falls, Oregon, so you were in the situation.
A member of a north American Indian people of the klamath river valley inn California.
So I had classmates from Hawaii and Klamath Falls, Oregon So you were in the situation.
Historically, the Klamath was the third-most important salmon river in the West, after the Columbia and the Sacramento.
Farmers in the Klamath basin use about 350, 000-400, 000 acre-feet of water a year.
